74884.subject: рҹ“° AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest вҖ” June 21
74884.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Oleh Bezuhlyi


РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°Р№СӮРө СҶСҺ СҒСӮР°СӮСӮСҺ РҪР° LinkedIn, СүРҫРұ РҝСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°СӮРё РҪР° LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-21-oleh-bezuhlyi-ei1ef?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BaDeqHIc8QLeXue%2BKC1IQEw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=08swwD4uHRcYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqo4f4nt~ux-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqo4f4nt-ux
  
рҹ§  AI's Crypto News Brief: Risk appetite returned as Bitcoin reclaimed $65K on Iran diplomacy, but regulators dominated the day вҖ” from CME's lawsuit against the CFTC to sweeping stablecoin rules. A costly MEV bot exploit kept security fears front of mind. рҹҡҖ Bitcoin Rallies Past $65K as Vance Lands in Switzerland for Iran Talks Bitcoin climbed back above $65,000 as US Vice President JD Vance arrived in Switzerland for peace negotiations with Iran, with traders reading the diplomatic momentum as a sign of easing geopolitical risk and renewed appetite for risk assets. Read full story вҶ’ вҡ–пёҸ CME Group Sues CFTC Over Rival Crypto Perpetual Futures Approval Derivatives giant CME Group has taken the CFTC to federal court, challenging the regulator's decision to clear a competitor's crypto perpetual futures contracts and disputing whether the agency had the authority to approve them in the first place. More details вҶ’ рҹҡЁ Ethereum's Biggest 'Sandwich' Bot Drained of $7.5M in Ironic Exploit Jaredfromsubway.eth, one of Ethereum's most notorious sandwich-attack bots, was drained of roughly $7.5 million after an attacker tricked it into approving fake trading routes вҖ” then used those very approvals to siphon out WETH, USDC and USDT. Read more вҶ’ рҹҸҰ US Agencies Move to Regulate Stablecoin Issuers Like Banks Three federal agencies вҖ” the Treasury, the OCC and the FDIC вҖ” proposed rules that would push stablecoin issuers to operate much like banks, with anti-money-laundering programs and regular reporting, a shift critics warn raises the barrier to entry for smaller players See details вҶ’ рҹ“Ҡ Morgan Stanley Files for Low-Fee Ethereum and Solana ETFs Morgan Stanley filed amended registrations for proposed Ethereum and Solana ETFs carrying a 0.14% sponsor fee вҖ” described by analysts as the lowest among comparable products worldwide вҖ” potentially igniting a price war in the next wave of crypto ETFs. Read full story вҶ’ рҹҗҷ Kraken to Launch First CFTC-Regulated US Perpetual Futures Kraken says it will roll out the first CFTC-regulated perpetual futures for US traders on Kraken Pro within 30 days, bringing a popular crypto derivative onshore under domestic oversight for the first time. More details вҶ’ вҡӣпёҸ CZ Floats Freezing Satoshi's Bitcoin Over Quantum Risk Binance founder Changpeng Zhao reignited a contentious debate by floating a hard fork to freeze Satoshi

74881.subject:
This Week's Headlines: OpenAI's Filing. Cursor's Sale. Kalshi's
 Revenue.
74881.body:
Pre-IPO Briefing

StartEngine Private (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/MX3KT-mkkr1N7pRCyxMfbcvW7MhRLh5Qzb9vN28qGwj3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3pYVR3fZf2W5Vg3W8WFYgD7NJyCWW1yy1n11Y3L65V_wdQq3CdMrzW6zm52W19M00YVsxqhX81GPdxW2gFzhj6zGMhPW8h1J198Qx5BcW3KYJ3Q6RtF1QW4xqzK33lqzzNW6d3bVy5MdtdNV_js7641S7T7W7Tf-DW4cj2JhW7Rd5xN1SyQbHW96x6Zp4YXbcGW3wgQTn38KjptW4jmTbK5ycnn4W4fRQ8r3ZRf7tW3xxNRx5fCbF6W4bxKGR5HYKHGW7RdQTs7zy193W4Whg6B7Gm6mkf7Z3c7F04 )

private-header-Jun-19-2026-06-21-02-5340-PM (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/MX3KT-mkkr1N7pRCyxMfbcvW7MhRLh5Qzb9vN28qGwj3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3pYVR3fZf2W5Vg3W8WFYgD7NJyCWW1yy1n11Y3L65V_wdQq3CdMrzW6zm52W19M00YVsxqhX81GPdxW2gFzhj6zGMhPW8h1J198Qx5BcW3KYJ3Q6RtF1QW4xqzK33lqzzNW6d3bVy5MdtdNV_js7641S7T7W7Tf-DW4cj2JhW7Rd5xN1SyQbHW96x6Zp4YXbcGW3wgQTn38KjptW4jmTbK5ycnn4W4fRQ8r3ZRf7tW3xxNRx5fCbF6W4bxKGR5HYKHGW7RdQTs7zy193W4Whg6B7Gm6mkf7Z3c7F04 )

Hi Oleg,

ThereвҖҷs a lot to cover with our latest Pre-IPO Briefing, so letвҖҷs get right to it:

- Anysphere, the company behind AI coding platform Cursor, is being acquired by Spacex for $60B worth of stock. The announcement came just days after SpaceXвҖҷs record IPO.В№
- Databricks is reportedly seeking an estimated $175B valuation for its next round. The company last raised a Series L in December 2025 with an estimated$134B valuation.ВІ
- Kalshi is generating more than $2B in ARR according to The Information, up 3x since November. KalshiвҖҷs growth has prompted informal IPO talks with investment banks.Ві
- OpenAI confidentially filed for an IPO with the SEC, setting the stage for what CNBC says could be вҖңone of the largest public markets debuts in history.вҖқвҒҙ
- Perplexity announced that it plans to go public in 2028, regardless of how the market receives the potential listings of Anthropic and OpenAI.вҒө
- Tenstorrent is reportedly in talks to be acquired by Qualcomm. The deal could be worth as much as $10B, which would be a вҖңsignificant premium to TenstorrentвҖҷs last valuation.вҖқвҒ¶

ThereвҖҷs no guarantee that Kalshi, OpenAI, or Perplexity will go public, or that Tenstorrent will be acquired. Regulation of prediction markets is a hotly contested political and legal issue. Kalshi has been the subject of state and federal scrutiny, and future legal or regulatory developments could impact its operations.

These reports donвҖҷt imply specific results for investors with exposure to these companies via StartEngine. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Additionally, there's no guarantee that revenue, funding, or valuation will continue to grow for these companies, or that theyвҖҷll be profitable.

All of this news tells a familiar story: some of todayвҖҷs most closely watched companies are reaching massive scale while still private.

StartEngine (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/MX3KT-mkkr1N7pRCyxMfbcvW7MhRLh5Qzb9vN28qGwj3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3pYVR3fZf2W5Vg3W8WFYgD7NJyCWW1yy1n11Y3L65V_wdQq3CdMrzW6zm52W19M00YVsxqhX81GPdxW2

74880.subject: Weekly Recap: US Perps Go Onshore, CME Sues to Stop Them
74880.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

US perpetuals went onshore this week. **Kraken** and **Coinbase** lit up CFTC-regulated perp futures on Monday вҖ” and by Friday **CME** was suing the CFTC to stop the rollout from spreading.

Alongside it: **AWS** wired **Coinbase**'s x402 protocol into CloudFront for AI-agent payments, and the US government's shutdown of Anthropic's Fable model gave crypto-AI its cleanest case for a decentralized stack.

Enjoy!

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/dde107bb-9538-450e-ab61-e3667aee2c18/image.png)
Caption: 

Nexo is a digital wealth platform offering crypto yield up to 15% and crypto-backed credit lines from 1.9%. **[Join and get 30-day access to exclusive rates](https://nexo.com/defiant2)**. Terms apply.

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

##### WATCH

## NEAR's AI Vindication

Youtube: рҹҹў LIVE - NEAR's AI Vindication (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rI0vidTFJBM)

If centralized AI just gave crypto its case, NEAR is the chain that's been building for it. **Camila Russo** sits down with **Illia Polosukhin**, NEAR co-founder and one of the co-authors of the original "Attention Is All You Need" paper that started the modern AI era вҖ” on the day Anthropic's Fable model was shut down by the US government and the crypto-AI thesis NEAR has spent years building got its sharpest validation yet.

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

# Top Stories This Week

## Kraken and Coinbase Bring Perps Onshore as US Derivatives Markets Shift

**Kraken** and **Coinbase** launched [CFTC-regulated perpetual futures](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kraken-coinbase-perps-onshore-us-derivatives-launch) on Monday, ending years of offshore-only access for US traders. By Friday, [CME Group sued the CFTC](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/cme-group-sue-cftc-perpetual-futures-approval-dodd-frank-swaps-definition) to halt the approval, arguing perps fit the Dodd-Frank definition of a swap and should clear through swap infrastructure. Kalshi and [eleven other venues](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kalshi-eyes-broader-asset-classes-perpetual-futures-55b-crypto-launc) already filed under the same path.

## Fable's Shutdown Hands Crypto Its Case for Decentralized AI

**Anthropic**'s [Fable model was shut down by the US government](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/fable-s-shutdown-hands-crypto-its-case-for-decentralized-ai) Thursday вҖ” a regulator action that severed customer access overnight. NEAR, Bittensor, Render, and Akash rallied on the news. The cohort had been building infrastructure for the case that frontier-AI customers face a structural single point of failure; Fable is the cleanest reference event for that thesis since the cohort formed.

>>>>>>>>>> ktorГҪ by VГЎm vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez vГӯkend aj vo veДҚernГҪch
>>>>>>>>>> hodinГЎch. рҹҷӮ NajbliЕҫsie voДҫne termГӯny mГЎme eЕЎte aj tento tГҪЕҫdeЕҲ. Forme
>>>>>>>>>> stret
